items.title: S&P 500 turns positive in major comeback as traders buy the dip after U.S.-Iran attacks: Live updates
items.description: The war between the U.S. and Iran is threatening to widen and jolt global energy supplies.

items.title: Has Caterpillar (CAT) Rallied Too Far After Strong Multi Year Share Price Gains
items.description: If you are wondering whether Caterpillar's current share price still reflects good value or if the stock has run too far, this article walks through the key numbers in a plain spoken way. Caterpillar's share price recently closed at US$742.83, with returns of 13.0% over 30 days, 24.1% year to date, 118.9% over 1 year, 205.5% over 3 years and 270.0% over 5 years, which naturally raises questions about risk, reward and what is already priced in. Recent coverage has focused on Caterpillar's...

items.title: Can Caterpillar's Momentum Continue in 2026 and Beyond?
items.description: Caterpillar's emergence as an AI play propelled the stock to stratospheric heights, but there are other reasons it can extend its momentum.
